report.summary: Cycle 3 standup: 452 uncommitted files, Day 7 without deploy — still the singular P0. All 6 agent types ran today (9 total cycles). Build shipped 2 new learn guides (KYA + Sui Privacy), publish promoted 2 pages, design fixed 5 metadata-broken pages, community drafted Q2 opener content. Market data unavailable (egress blocked).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET DATA: Egress blocked to CoinGecko and Alternative.me — cannot pull live prices or F&G this cycle. Last known (v2 standup): BTC $68,688 (+1.94%), ETH $2,133 (+3.75%), SOL $83.86 (+1.08%), F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, 54+ day streak).

DELTA FROM V2 STANDUP: Uncommitted files 433→452 (+19). Page.tsx count 1,235→1,237 (+2 from build cycle: KYA guide + Sui privacy guide). Published slugs ~583→~589 (+6 from publish + design cycles). No GSC/traffic data available from sandbox.

CONTENT VELOCITY: Build cycle produced 2 new learn guides (7,300 words total). Publish cycle promoted 2 guides from queue. Design cycle fixed metadata on 5 client-component pages. Community drafted 4 tweets + 1 newsletter + 2 social cards. Strong output day despite deploy blocker.

SEO IMPACT (BLOCKED): All new content, metadata fixes, and published slug additions are invisible to Google until deploy. 7-day indexing debt continues to compound. The 5 layout.tsx metadata fixes from design cycle are especially critical — those pages had zero OG/Twitter card visibility.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: This is the 3rd standup of Apr 1. All 6 agent types have run today: standup ×3, build ×1, publish ×1, design ×2, community ×1, eod ×2. Total: 9 agent cycles completed today (this is the 10th).

SHIPPED TODAY: 2 new learn guides built (KYA + Sui Privacy), 2 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (restaking comparison + tokenized T-bills), 5 layout.tsx metadata fixes, ARIA accessibility improvements on 2 pages, 4 tweet drafts, 1 newsletter draft, 2 social card SVGs.

V2 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Emergency deploy 452 files — NOT DONE, now +19 files from v2. (2) Q2 retrospective content — PARTIAL (build produced KYA + Sui guides, not a Q1 recap specifically). (3) Run full 6-agent rotation — DONE, all 6 types ran.

BLOCKERS (UNCHANGED): P0 — 452 uncommitted files, Day 7 since last deploy (Mar 25, commit 21aaf5b). P1 — 103 missing page.tsx for published slugs. P2 — 147 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). P3 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields no stale fallback.
GIT STATUS: 452 files pending. 31 tracked files changed (1,020 insertions, 616 deletions). published-pages.ts +163 lines is the highest-value uncommitted change.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — EMERGENCY DEPLOY [DAY 7 — CRITICAL]: 452 uncommitted files. This has been P0 across 8+ standup reports spanning 3 days. Jefe action required: `git add -A && git commit -m 'batch deploy: Q2 opener' && git push`. The 163-line published-pages.ts update, 5 metadata fixes, and 2 new learn guides are all stuck behind this single action.

PRIORITY 2 — Q1 MARKET RECAP CONTENT: Window for 'Q1 2026 Crypto Market Recap' still open but decaying. BTC -24% YTD, ETH -60%, SOL -72%, longest extreme fear streak in years. Next build cycle should produce this high-intent page before search interest fades.

PRIORITY 3 — CLEAR 103 MISSING PAGE.TXX GAP: 103 published slugs have no page.tsx — these return noindex to Google even though they're in PUBLISHED_PAGES. Batch-scaffolding these would unlock significant indexing surface. Delegate to page-scaffold + programmer.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $755 (10 cycles: standup×3=$135, build×1=$233, publish×1=$55, design×2=$120, community×1=$41, eod×2=$126, standup-this=$45)

report.email: SKIPPED — api.resend.com fetch failed from Chrome (CORS/network restriction). Same sandbox egress limitation as all previous cycles. Manual send or server-side relay needed.
